---
title: Giverny
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557444/giverny_20210812_ar7hgu.png
description: Maison de Claude Monet à Giverny
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2021/08/12
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557444/giverny_20210812_ar7hgu.png)
